posts.text:
The new WNBA collective bargaining agreement is proof that capitalism does not control America. The alphabet LGBTQIA+ mafia decides the upper American industry, financing organizations like the WNBA to push its agenda.

Video
posts.quote:
The new WNBA collective bargaining agreement is proof that capitalism does not control America. The alphabet LGBTQIA+ mafia decides the upper American industry, financing organizations like the WNBA to push its agenda.

Video

posts.text:
I'm not so sure, Matt. The WNBA is like Netflix. It's not a business, it's an agenda. They will finance the agenda as long as necessary.


Matt Finkes (@MattFinkes)

The WNBA will be gone in 3 years. It was already a losing entity, now they just multiplied the loss. The NBA owners won’t give away money for long.



— https://nitter.net/MattFinkes/status/2034347927649280019#m
